scripts.build:worker: npx tsc worker-src/index.ts --outDir build-order-processor/ --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --target es2020
scripts.sam-deploy: sam deploy --stack-name PeachNutritionStack --s3-bucket peach-nutrition-deployment --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM --region eu-north-1
scripts.aws-await-stack-deletion: aws cloudformation wait stack-delete-complete --stack-name PeachNutritionStack --region eu-north-1
